docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, GIZA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEIMAN MARCUS *THE COURT FINDS THE MERCHANDISE RETURNED WAS WORN BEYOND THE POINT WHEN THEY COULD BE RETURNED BECAUSE OF THE DAMAGE TO THE SOLES OF THE SHOES. PLAINTIFF ADMITTED THEY HAD BEEN WORN OUTSIDE. DEFENDANT'S SHIPPING LABEL INDICATED THE SHOES SHOULD BE TRIED ON OVER CARPET TO PROTECT THE SOLES. THE COURT FINDS TAHT SHOES WERE NOT DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT SHALL RETURN THE SHOES TO THE PLAINTIFF OR REFUND HER PURCHASE PRICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NEIMAN MARCUS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, GIZA AS TO DEFENDANT NEIMAN MARCUS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-16-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEIMAN MARCUS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $620.42 FILED BY LEWIS, GIZA AS TO DEFENDANT NEIMAN MARCUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY LEWIS, GIZA NEIMAN MARCUS
